body.title: Web UI: rename 'Shared' channel to 'Public'
body.result: renamed 'Shared' tab to 'Public' in web UI (server.py:2157) — 949b4773
body.description:
Rename the 'Shared' channel to 'Public' throughout the web UI and underlying code. This is a user-facing terminology improvement — 'Public' is clearer about the channel's visibility scope. Also affects configuration, API responses, and database references.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step in sprint (likely web UI views, channel dispatch code, config files, tests)
**Design rules:** channel naming must be consistent across UI, API, DB, and config
**Scope boundary:** IN: rename Shared→Public in web UI, API, config, tests. OUT: deployment/ops changes (channel re-creation is operational). OUT: other channel renames.
**Completion criteria:** web UI displays 'Public' instead of 'Shared' in channel tabs and feeds; all channel references in code use 'public' (lowercase canonical); tests reference updated name; no broken references in codebase
